title: DN AGRAR and BSOG ENERGY Sign the Development and Supply Contracts for Biomethane Production Facility in Alba
content: DN AGRAR Group (BVB: DN), one of the leading integrated agrifood company in Romania and largest dairy milk producer from Europe, and BSOG Energy, an energy company focused on developing biomethane production plants across Romania owned by Black Sea Oil & Gas, have signed the contracts for the next steps in the development of what will become one of the largest biomethane production facility in Romania. The agreement signed outlines the BSOG Energy â€“ DN AGRAR collaboration in developing the plant and the long-term supply of organic raw material, manure, generated by DN AGRARâ€™s farms, following the initial cooperation agreement signed in October 2024.
author: Analysts Account
